title: Register tests so ctest can drive them
description: Enable testing and add each test through add_test so the suite runs uniformly under ctest in local and CI builds.
body: Use when a project has tests that should run as part of the build workflow. Do not invoke test binaries by hand outside the build system. Actions: call enable_testing or include(CTest); register tests with add_test naming the command; set properties like labels and timeouts; run ctest from the build dir. Validation signals include ctest discovering and passing every test, and a non-zero exit on failure that CI can gate on. Risk boundary: tests not registered with ctest are easy to forget in CI, so wire them into the build rather than leaving them manual.
